case_title: SWANSON, ALAN V. VS WATKINS, MICHAEL D.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY SWANSON, ALAN V. AS TO DEFENDANT WATKINS, MICHAEL D. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-31-2001 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
